The Orchidaceae family, also known as the orchid family, is one of the largest and most diverse families of flowering plants. Angraecoides moandensis is further classified as a flowering plant in the kingdom Plantae. Within the kingdom Plantae, Angraecoides moandensis is classified as a monocot, which is a type of flowering plant that has one cotyledon in its seed.
